codeReview.summary: This is a verification feature - the spinning icon animations were already implemented in the codebase. The worker correctly verified that VAL-MICRO-005 and VAL-MICRO-006 requirements are met. The RefreshCcw icon spins when refresh is disabled (during manual refresh or when catalog status is 'running'), and the Shuffle icon spins during reroll loading. Both animations use Tailwind's animate-spin class conditionally applied via the cn() utility. Note: The commit e7936ee referenced in the handoff is for a different feature (age filter hover states), but since this task was verification-only, the actual implementation tested predates that commit and is correct.

issues.description: Handoff references commit e7936ee which is for 'feat: add hover states to age filter toggle items', not the spin animations feature. However, since this was a verification task where no code was written, this is acceptable - the verified implementation already existed.

summary: PASS - Verified spinning icon animations for Reroll (Shuffle icon with animate-spin during loading) and Refresh (RefreshCcw icon with animate-spin during refresh/catalog-running). Implementation uses Tailwind's animate-spin class conditionally via cn() utility. Worker correctly followed frontend-polish-worker skill procedure, ran lint/build validators, and performed interactive browser testing. Both VAL-MICRO-005 and VAL-MICRO-006 requirements are satisfied.
